sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 10.63 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.10)

statement.latex: Is there a doubly transitive permutation group in which the stabilizer of a~point is infinite cyclic? { Ya.\,P.\,Sysak} No (V.\,D.\,Mazurov, Siberian Math.~J., { 31} (1990), 615--617; \ Gy.\,K\'arolyi, S.\,J.\,Kov\'acs, P.\,P.\,P\'alfy, Aequationes Math., { 39}, no.\,1 (1990), 161--166).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
